title: Known Legends
description: Something brokes into your minecraft. That's unnormal, maybe fire will help you.
body: When you play minecraft with my mod, you might see strange text like "_Something broke..._" or "_They knocking easily..._" First is meaning you have big problems Second is meaning you have good luck For now, in mod there's only 4 phases: **Phase zero:** - Only air can infect. **First phase:** - All blocks can infect and diamond ore is infects into glitch ore which needs to make fix powder to defend your base, make bunker or make self-defence (hermetic walls and glass will break in some time). **Second phase:** - Now there's glitch entities and glitch grass both of them is giving new "Glitch" effect it's damaging you in some time and some times can spawn glitch block under you. **Third phase:** - There's glitch lasers which is also giving new effect but in vertical, with particles. - Now spawning glitch altars which needs to craft new glitch tools, first one is glitch sword, to make it you need to place on the altar diamond sword, 2 glitch shards and glitch bone. (to make glitch bone you need to place on the altar 3 glitch blocks and bone) Please, see other recipes in mods like JEI or REI.
